name: gemin-eye
description: Invoke Gemini as a review and coding partner from inside Claude Code. Vault-aware (pairs with vault-bridge). Sources primarily from Claude-provided context, generated Markdown, and existing docs — does not scaffold new project files unless explicitly authorised. Gemini-specific artefacts live under `gemin-eye/` subfolders in the vault or in `docs/`, never scattered across the codebase.
